_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Developing code for analysis involves designing, implementing and improving analytical approaches, manually or via an interface.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.460), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.445).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.529). Shared vocabulary: [analytical, designing]. DDaT-only terms [analysis, approaches, code, developing, implementing, improving] vs WIDAI-only terms [communication, complex, executing, execution, executive, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.879, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.7%). "Developing code for analysis involves designing, implementing and improving anal" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.511 ≈ STS 0.529 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytical, designing] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [analytical, designing]. DDaT-only: [analysis, approaches, code, developing, implementing, improving]. WIDAI-only: [communication, complex, executing, execution, executive, findings].
